steps.title: Use the negating phrase
steps.content: The phrase by no means negates the word in the blank. Since Farhadi himself cites Bruegel as an inspiration, recognizing Bruegel's influence is clearly worth doing.

steps.title: Test the negated meanings
steps.content: Choice A would mean the recognition is not substantial. Choice B would mean it is not satisfying. Choice D would mean it is not appropriate. The intended meaning is that the recognition is definitely important. The answer is C.
